reviews.review_description: Nice

I love this game and most of my friends do too because of how awesome it is to be able to use your hands to cast spells in a really cool way and this is probably my favorite game on the quest but, this game has quite a few issues. For example, when using certain spells like the ones that require to make an orb in your hand, it is very hard to get it right and although doable it could be better. Another thing is that you can only play by yourself even though there is so much potential for a multiplayer! There could be an arena, an open world, or even creator made “boss battles.” Anyway this is an amazing game and I really see it becoming really big in the future

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support and feedback! We're glad you're enjoying drakheir. your review means a lot to us and it's extremely encouraging. Thanks again for your support and we look forward to providing you with more enjoyable gaming experiences!

reviews.review_description: The game is a great basis but without the tracking power if the quest three the tracking isnt as reliable as it should be. My sugestion is a controller morde so quest 2 users can have a much more fun experience without hand gliching out or some spells not being recignised always. Otherwise great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion! We're glad you see the game as a solid foundation. We will consider adding a controller mode to provide a more enjoyable and reliable experience. Your feedback is crucial to us, and we hope you continue to find joy in the game! 🎮🌟

reviews.review_description: No. This game isn’t ready.

developer_response.body: Hello dear player, we apologize for any inconvenience. We kindly invite you to join our Discord server and share your valuable suggestions to help us improve the game. We look forward to enhancing your gaming experience! Drakheir Discord: https://discord.gg/VNdD2cmcw2

reviews.review_description: Actually a good and interesting game, but why only hand tracking? Make hand tracking and controllers: optional! I personally much prefer precise control with feedback. Hand tracking is inaccurate, doesn't always work as it should, especially when things get hectic it's a struggle.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We will consider adding controller support to better accommodate players' preferences. Please stay tuned for our updates, and feel free to provide more feedback. We appreciate your support and understanding!

reviews.review_description: I’m not playing until controllers are added into game because the moment isn’t that good. As this happened it is also quite hard to do fighting. But this is just my opinion as my hand tracking experience isn’t that good on quest 2

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are actively working on optimizing the movement controls in the game and hope to bring you a better experience in future updates.

reviews.review_description: This seems like an amazing experience at the start, and it really could be. The issues are the hand gestures not being explained properly or incorrectly, and the movement also feels like it could use some work, but it might be more linked to the hand tracking not seeming to follow along properly no matter how slow I go.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are actively working on optimizing the movement controls in the game and hope to bring you a better experience in future updates.

reviews.review_description:
Sorry I don’t usually leave reviews but I can’t even get through the tutorial. The hand tracking is not allowing me to teleport move so I gave up!

Devs please look into this and fix your game.

developer_response.body: Dear Joooools, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Currently, we have known this issue and are working hard to optimize it. We anticipate releasing a new version in February. Look forward to your experience!

reviews.review_description: This is a great example about how full hand tracking games should be!! Graphic design is georgous, combat system is great and nice story. I played this game months ago and now returned to play again after v2.0 update. There is no reason why you should not play this title especially now that is free. A must have ..... In my honest opinion

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your enthusiastic feedback! Your support means a lot to us, and we'll continue striving to deliver an even better gaming experience. We hope you have a fantastic time playing!

reviews.review_description: Drakheir is like pure magic. No controllers, just my hands casting spells! Keep up the enchanting work! 🪄🌟

developer_response.body: Dear iSkype! Drakheir 2.0 version is now live, introducing rich new gameplay and optimizations. Quickly update the game and embark on a new adventure with us!

reviews.review_description: This game is really cool. As soon as you fire it up and set down your controllers, you're met with a beautiful menu and hands. You immediately feel like a powerful ninja. It takes a little time to adjust to the two different movement methods, but they both work pretty well. It's cool that you use a hand gesture to switch to a different movement method. The training is fun. It really helps you figure out the spells. The levels start out pretty easy, especially when you learn the long, but deadly special. I am looking forward to seeing how it progresses! I've not played anything like this yet. Check it out!

developer_response.body: Dear SaltyDadda! Drakheir 2.0 version is now live, introducing rich new gameplay and optimizations. Quickly update the game and embark on a new adventure with us!

reviews.review_description: It's really cool in my opinion I liked the hand signs and would like to see more and like combination of different ones to use an ability and I liked the story of it  and would definitely like to see a full version or a finished product

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic recommendation! We're glad you enjoy our game. If you have any suggestions or feedback, please let us know. Once again, thank you for your support, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: A game you must have a try!
reviews.review_description: The game's visuals truly amazed me!! It's currently the only magic adventure game I've met with hand tracking. It makes me feel like... I am a true wizard!! I am able to cast various magic spells with just hand gestures. What a fantastic design!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your fantastic review! We are delighted to hear that you are satisfied with the visual effects and magical adventure experience with hand tracking in Drakheir. We are dedicated to crafting this design, and your positive feedback holds significant meaning for us. If you have more thoughts or suggestions, please feel free to share. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to have a magical time in Drakheir! 🧙‍♂️🌟

reviews.review_description: The first time trying a game with gesture tracking, it feels quite novel and fun. The experience is not bad.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support and feedback! We're glad you're enjoying drakheir. your review means a lot to us and it's extremely encouraging. Thanks again for your support and we look forward to providing you with more enjoyable gaming experiences! 🎮🌟.

reviews.review_description: The game is EXTREMELY fun and addictive ngl. I also really like the game has a lot of spells you can chose from, which makes the games even mire fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support and feedback! We're glad you're enjoying drakheir. your review means a lot to us and it's extremely encouraging. Thanks again for your support and we look forward to providing you with more enjoyable gaming experiences! 🎮🌟.

reviews.review_description: I've been playing for the past few days until I got to one section, I was convinced I had either broke or got soft locked in. There's this huge hand statue with a coin. There's a sword on a lump of stone on the other side of the hand that does nothing, and there's also a bunch of floating rocks that if you stand in one spot they form a sword in the sky. This game hasn't been very puzzling, so I'm baffled. I really like this game and would love it if anyone could tell me how to just escape this area. It's driving me nuts.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused. Please join our Discord and contact me so that we can resolve any issues you encounter more quickly. Here is the link: discord.gg/Wb9Ee9jgAb.

reviews.review_description: For players who enjoy adventures and magic, this game is definitely worth a try. I have already recommended it to my friends!!! Can't wait to see the developers bringing more content in the future!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic recommendation! We're glad you enjoy our game. If you have any suggestions or feedback, please let us know. Once again, thank you for your support, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: It's truly a masterpiece! This game is incredibly fun and adventurous. I highly recommend everyone to play it because it's really fantastic.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic recommendation! We're glad you enjoy our game. If you have any suggestions or feedback, please let us know. Once again, thank you for your support, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: If you like gesture control and magic elements, this game is definitely for you. From simple gestures to powerful spells, you can become a real master of magic.

developer_response.body: If you like gesture control and magic elements, this game is definitely for you. From simple gestures to powerful spells, you can become a real master of magic.

reviews.review_description: This game is really awesome! There are so many different magic skills to play with, and it's so much fun to cast spells. The hand tracking make this game incredibly cool and immersive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're pleased that you enjoy our game. Your praise for hand tracking brings us great joy. Looking forward to you spending more enjoyable moments in the game!
